theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A travel brand focusing on adventure and weekend escapes needs to feel inviting, organic, and grounded. The 'vanish' theme plays well with warm sunsets, deep indigos (night skies/mystery), and earthy Indian textures.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none
scales.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-brand-primary

rules: Headings should use Cormorant Garamond for an elegant, premium, culturally-rooted 'sexy' vibe.
Body text should use Outfit for pristine modern legibility.
Avoid standard bold fonts for main headings; rely on font-light or font-medium with tight tracking.
Never center paragraphs. Left-align body copy.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6 to p-12 for sections. Containers with borders need ample internal padding.
spacing_and_layout.mobile_first: Design for 375px first. Use grid-cols-1 for mobile, scaling up to bento grids on desktop.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: For galleries and cards, mix tall and square shapes to create asymmetry and tension.

surface_strategies.cards: Subtle borders (border-border/50), flat solid backgrounds. On hover, slight lift (-translate-y-1) and soft shadow.
surface_strategies.header: Crystal glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/40. Fixed z-50.
surface_strategies.images: Use overlay gradients (e.g., bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent) on hero/trip images to ensure text contrast.

components.custom_elements: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for complex overlapping grids (Hero, Gallery).

specific_components.carousel: embla-carousel-react for mobile swipeable trip cards
specific_components.form: shadcn Form, Input, Select, Textarea for Enquiry Booking

sections_blueprint.layout: Fixed top, glassmorphism. Logo wordmark (Rozha One) left, hamburger menu right (mobile). Links center, CTA right (desktop).
Full viewport height minus header. Large background image (Mist/Backpacker). Content aligned bottom-left or center. High contrast overlay.
sections_blueprint.content: Wordmark 'Choomantar', Tagline 'Vanish into the extraordinary.', Primary CTA 'Find your escape'.

sections_blueprint.layout: Horizontal scrolling carousel on mobile, 3-column grid on desktop. Card design with image, location label, title, dates, price.
Bento grid (Tetris mode). 1 large hero category (Weekend Getaways), smaller surrounding categories (Himalayas, Backpacking, etc).
Alternating staggered layout. Large earthy icons, Indian motif background texture (subtle opacity).
Asymmetric masonry grid. Images of different aspect ratios. Focus on close-ups and wide landscape contrast.
Editorial ribbon marquee (slow scroll) or swipeable cards. Uses serif quotes and avatar images.
Split layout: Left side image/copy, Right side Shadcn form. Clean, floating label style if possible, or distinct inputs.
Massive typography for 'Choomantar'. Dark background (deep indigo) for contrast shift. Minimal links. Large social icons.

hero.description: Backpacker walking into the mist - perfect for 'Vanish' theme

icons_and_assets.usage: Use icons sparingly. Avoid replacing text with icons. Keep stroke width fine (1.5 or 1) for a premium feel.

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='booking-submit'.

motion_and_interactions.reveal: Use Framer Motion for scroll reveal. Staggered fade-up for gallery and cards.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Hover states must have a transition. Image scaling (scale-105) inside overflow-hidden containers for cards.
